Game.Name: Momotarou Dentetsu Happy (Japan)
Game.plot: Momotarou Dentetsu Happy is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Make and published by Hudson,which was released in Japan in 1996.
Game.Notes: A game similar to sugoroku and Monopoly, where players race around on a series of electric railcars, boats, and airplanes to acquire wealth and make purchases, while competing with rival players and characters. It is a board game where the goal is to have the most wealth and property by the end of the game.
